note: Disciplines Shawn is actively learning, tracked in public. Status ladder: Exploring -> Practicing -> Shipping. milestones[] and proof_links[] are filled in as real work lands (kept empty until then on purpose - no fabricated progress).

disciplines.why: Original images beat stock every time. Learning to shoot so every post, thumbnail, and brand frame is mine - not a render, not a stock grab.
Building in public only compounds if people can watch it. Learning DaVinci Resolve to cut the streams, demos, and shorts into something worth following.
Bad audio kills good video. Learning to cut, clean, and mix so the voice carries - for streams, shorts, and anything with a mic.
